sections.heading: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
sections.body: Software engineer with 6+ years of experience designing cloud-native platforms and microservice architectures. Delivered observability tooling adopted by 3 product teams and reduced mean time to recovery by 40% through automated incident-response pipelines. Combines hands-on Python and Kubernetes expertise with a passion for developer productivity and cross-team knowledge sharing.

categories.label: Cloud & DevOps
categories.value: AWS (EKS, Lambda, RDS, S3), Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions

categories.label: Methodologies
categories.value: Scrum, Kanban, TDD, Site Reliability Engineering

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
roles.company_line: CloudNova GmbH  |  Berlin, Germany  |  Mar 2022 – Present
bullets: Architected an observability platform using Prometheus, Grafana, and custom Python exporters, adopted by 3 product teams and reducing mean time to recovery by 40%.
Led migration of 12 services from EC2 to Kubernetes (EKS), achieving 99.95% uptime and cutting infrastructure costs by 25%.
Designed event-driven data pipeline with Kafka and AWS Lambda processing 500K+ daily events for real-time anomaly detection.
Mentored 4 junior engineers through weekly code reviews and pair programming, reducing average onboarding time by 35%.
Introduced Terraform modules shared across 3 environments, eliminating manual provisioning and enabling zero-downtime deployments.

roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built the customer-facing dashboard using React and Next.js, serving 10K+ monthly active users with 98% Lighthouse performance score.
Implemented automated CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes.
Developed RESTful APIs in Python/FastAPI for payment processing integration, handling €5M+ in monthly transactions.
Introduced automated testing practices (unit + integration), increasing code coverage from 30% to 85%.

roles.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed responsive web applications for 12+ client projects using React and Node.js.
Created reusable component library that reduced development time by 25% across projects.
Collaborated with UX designers to implement accessible interfaces meeting WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

entries.title: M.Sc. Computer Science
entries.subtitle: Technical University of Munich  |  2015 – 2017
entries.detail: Thesis: Optimizing container orchestration scheduling using reinforcement learning

sections.heading: OPEN SOURCE CONTRIBUTIONS, PATENTS & PUBLICATIONS
bullets: Core contributor to FastAPI — authored async middleware refactor merged in v0.100, reducing average response latency by 12%.
Co-inventor on patent DE 10 2023 001 234 — "Method for Real-Time Anomaly Detection in Container Orchestration Systems" (filed 2023).

sections.heading: COMMUNITY & SPEAKING
bullets: Speaker at Berlin JS Meetup on "Migrating to Microservices Without Losing Your Sanity" (2023).
Open-source contributor to FastAPI and Terraform AWS provider.
Mentor at ReDI School of Digital Integration, teaching web development to refugees (2020 – present).
